scope: GSC-only analysis (57 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-15, property www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com) plus keywords-master.json. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual. Counts labeled 'keywords' are keyword counts, never page counts.
wins: 8 of the 22 data-bearing tracked keywords hold page 1: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at 2.5 plus 7 terms in #4-10, including 'bariatric counseling' (6.3), 'bariatric therapist' (7.1), and 'bariatric counseling near me' (7.6).
'bariatric counseling' is the strongest mover with real volume: +6.7 positions to 6.3 on 20 impressions; its longer arc is 25.0 (2026-05-07) to 6.3 now.
Two commercial local terms climbed out of page 3 since early May: 'weight loss counseling san antonio' 25.3 to 6.0 and 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' 23.0 to 6.0.
The hydration blog post remains the traffic engine: 20 clicks / 2,495 impressions at position 4.9, with the self-esteem (603 imp @ 7.5) and sleep (626 imp @ 10.0) posts also on page 1.
Clicks ticked up to 8 in the latest snapshot vs 7 on 2026-07-13 and 2 on 2026-05-07.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 22 of 82 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 60 show none. This is a keyword count, NOT a page count - the 82 keywords map to 50 distinct target pages (48 live www, 2 staging-targeted), and most formerly staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live (hygiene, not lost traffic).

Visibility drift continues: impressions 2,447 (2026-05-07) vs 1,459 (2026-07-15), and impression-weighted avg position 14.9 vs 22.8. Vs the 07-13 run, impressions dipped again (1,622 to 1,459) and the #1 tier went 1 to 0.
CTR stays near zero: 8 clicks on 1,459 impressions (~0.5%); the GLP-1 medications guide (364 imp @ 9.8) and holistic post (209 imp) took 0 clicks.

Slipped commercial terms: 'weight loss counseling' -11.8 to 32.6 (5 imp), 'weight loss counseling or therapy' -11.7 to 16.3 (6 imp), 'bariatric surgery counseling' -7.7 to 14.0 (4 imp, was #1 on 07-13), 'holistic approach to weight loss' -10.7 to 42.2 (5 imp).

Caveat: most tracked positions rest on single-digit impressions and swing day to day - treat all deltas, including 'bariatric counseling san antonio' easing from #1 in May to 2.5 on 2 impressions, as directional only.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 remaining staging-targeted targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their live www URLs so GSC can match; if a staging-to-prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes rather than inferring a count from keyword data.

Fix CTR leakage: add CTAs and internal links from the high-impression blog posts (hydration 2,495 imp, sleep 626, self-esteem 603, GLP-1 medications 364 with 0 clicks) into the matching service pages; rewrite titles/meta on 0-click page-1 posts.

Investigate the 'bariatric surgery counseling' swing (#1 on 07-13 to 14.0 today on 4 impressions) via the query-x-page joins - determine whether Google is rotating the ranking URL before touching the page.
On-page refresh for the slipped weight-loss pair ('weight loss counseling' 32.6, 'weight loss counseling or therapy' 16.3): retitle/re-intro against current page-1 competitors.

Defend the core local #2-10 block ('bariatric counseling san antonio' 2.5, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' 6.0, 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' 6.0) with fresh internal links and FAQ schema (bcc-faq-schema block) for rich-result/AI-overview eligibility.
summary: Page-1 breadth improved - 8 tracked keywords on page 1 and 'bariatric counseling' jumped +6.7 to 6.3 - but total impressions are down ~40% since early May (2,447 to 1,459), avg position drifted to 22.8, the #1 tier emptied, and CTR sits near 0.5%. Top priorities: convert high-impression blog traffic with CTAs/internal links and diagnose the 'bariatric surgery counseling' #1-to-14 swing.
